mundo.titulo: Personal decision for Starmer on whether to fight leadership contest, minister says
mundo.resumen: Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy tells the BBC that the prime minister has "shown before that he's up for a fight" and she "wouldn't write [him] off".

mundo.titulo: The UK is churning through leaders. Is the country becoming harder to govern?
mundo.resumen: Discontent with the political class is greater than ever - has the UK become ungovernable?

mundo.titulo: Forty-three arrests after £4.5m police operation to keep rival London protests apart
mundo.resumen: Serious clashes between Unite the Kingdom and pro-Palestinian protesters were avoided on Saturday.

mundo.titulo: 'Look Mum, one point': Why does the UK keep getting Eurovision wrong?
mundo.resumen: After four years of flops, the BBC has to think hard about how it approaches Eurovision in 2027.

mundo.titulo: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
mundo.resumen: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

mundo.titulo: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
mundo.resumen: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

negocios.titulo: Robert paid £726 to skip the driving test waiting list. New laws mean others won't be able to
negocios.resumen: The government is cracking down on third parties who use bots to buy tests and resell them at inflated prices.

negocios.titulo: 'They took £20,000 I didn't owe': Parents hit by child maintenance errors
negocios.resumen: John Hammond is one of 30 parents who told BBC Your Voice they'd experienced problems with the CMS.

negocios.titulo: Swatch shuts stores after crowds queue for new watch
negocios.resumen: Hundreds of people queue outside branches across the UK to get the £335 item.

negocios.titulo: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
negocios.resumen: Analysts say the moves have been fuelled by concerns a Burnham-led government would increase government borrowing.

negocios.titulo: British Gas pays £20m over prepayment meter force-fitting scandal
negocios.resumen: The regulator say the energy supplier breached licence conditions aimed at protecting customers in vulnerable situations.

negocios.titulo: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
negocios.resumen: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.

tecnologia.titulo: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
tecnologia.resumen: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

tecnologia.titulo: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
tecnologia.resumen: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

tecnologia.titulo: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
tecnologia.resumen: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

tecnologia.titulo: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
tecnologia.resumen: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits

tecnologia.titulo: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
tecnologia.resumen: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

tecnologia.titulo: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
tecnologia.resumen: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

tecnologia.titulo: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok settle suit over harm to students
tecnologia.resumen: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok have settled the first lawsuit of its kind, alleging that social media addiction has cost public schools massive amounts of money, according to Bloomberg. The suit, filed by the Breathitt County School District in Kentucky, claims that social media has disrupted learning and created a mental health crisis, straining budgets. The […]

tecnologia.titulo: Sony tries to explain that its AI Camera Assistant doesn’t suck
tecnologia.resumen: After Sony drew some unwanted attention for a post demonstrating its AI Camera Assistant on the Xperia 1 XIII, it's trying to clarify how the feature works. The company says it doesn't edit photos, but makes suggestions based on lighting, depth, and subject. Point the camera at something, and it will give you four options […]

tecnologia.titulo: NPR’s Manoush Zomorodi talks about living with too much tech
tecnologia.resumen: Manoush Zamorodi is an accomplished reporter, podcast host, and author. Her new book, Body Electric, takes a comprehensive look at how technology is impacting our physical health. It's a collaboration between NPR and Columbia University Medical Center that picks up where her first title, Bored and Brilliant, left off. That book looked at how technology […]

tecnologia.resumen: I really liked the SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless, so the company didn't have to say much to get me excited about its successor.
